channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Timothée Chalamet stuns fans with college football knowledge after criticism for being named ESPN guest picker
item.description: College Football fans were impressed by Hollywood actor Timothée Chalamet's knowledge of the sport during an appearance on ESPN's "College GameDay.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Man City drops more points after draw with Crystal Palace and Man United loses again
item.description: Manchester City’s Premier League title defense took another blow after drawing with Crystal Palace 2-2 on Saturday. Four-time defending champion City ended a seven-game winless run on Wednesday by beating Nottingham Forest, but dropped more points with the draw at Selhurst Park.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Everton vs. Liverpool postponed because of Storm Darragh. Other Premier League games remain on
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — The Merseyside derby between Everton and Liverpool was postponed on Saturday because of Storm Darragh, which brought dangerous winds and heavy rain to the west coast. The Premier League match was due to kick off at 12.30 p.m. U.K.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 24 Army wins AAC championship in first attempt as Daily runs for 4 TDs in 35-14 win over Tulane
item.description: WEST POINT, N.Y. (AP) — The first conference championship celebration in Army history was underway at midfield and Bryson Daily made clear it would be a brief one. The Black Knights are going after another trophy next week. “Beat Navy,” Daily said.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pitcher Clay Holmes agrees to $38 million, 3-year contract with Mets, AP source says
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Clay Holmes and the New York Mets have agreed to a $38 million, three-year contract, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLS Cup championship sold out as Los Angeles Galaxy shoot for 6th title
item.description: It will be a packed crowd Saturday when the Los Angeles Galaxy attempt to capture their league-record sixth MLS Cup. The Galaxy will face off with the New York Red Bulls at Dignity Health Sports Park at 1 p.m., and team officials said tickets have sold out.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Dan Campbell acknowledges Lions' Dan Skipper as he vomits during impassioned postgame victory speech
item.description: The Detroit Lions are heading back to the playoffs. A win over the Packers was Detroit's 12th of the season and punched their ticket to the postseason.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SafeSport Center changes targeted in new bill aimed at sex abuse in sports
item.description: Four members of Congress unveiled a bipartisan bill Friday that would spark changes at the U.S. Center for SafeSport, placing a time limit on resolving cases that can sometimes take years and improving communication between the center and abuse survivors.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State expected to hire Bronco Mendenhall
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It looks like Bronco Mendenhall is coming back to Utah. Utah State is expected to announce the former BYU head coach as its new head football coach as soon as Friday. ESPN reporter Pete Thamel was the first to break the news.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes bring in 21 players on early signing day
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With the future of head coach Kyle Whittingham still up in the air, and the search for a new offensive coordinator ongoing, the Utes football program inked 19 new players on National Signing Day Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ryan Poles to remain Bears general manager and lead search for new head coach
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — While his first head coaching hire is now out, Ryan Poles is still the general manager of the Chicago Bears — for now.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Christian McCaffrey's season 'potentially' over after knee injury in 49ers' loss to Bills
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — San Francisco running back Christian McCaffrey suffered a knee injury that coach Kyle Shanahan described as “potentially” season-ending in the 49ers’ 35-10 loss to the Buffalo Bills on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Montrose def. Pueblo West 18-7 to advance to the championship game
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Montrose Red Hawks are heading to the Class 4A state championship game after defeating the Pueblo West Cyclones 18-7 in a hard-fought semifinal matchup.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5
